goal: Unlock the FE v6 Package and Playground workflow by wiring the desktop app to existing agent-package and playground APIs after a valid benchmark report.
head: d9da6f1
blocked_scope: Changing agent contract, verifier, fallback, playground, benchmark, export, release-readiness, M6 review, model catalog, or evidence policy
Inventing package, verifier, playground, or benchmark evidence
Downloading or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Implementing export workflow screens in this phase
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may only add frontend API-client routes and desktop UI/model/mock/e2e coverage for the v6 Package/Playground screen using existing backend agent-package/playground APIs, plus LLM handoff docs, completion log, and PABCD contract.
required_commands: rg -n -- "projectPackage|listAgentPackages|createAgentPackage|runPlayground|Build package|Package built|Playground result|Agent package|Package workflow" apps/desktop/src/lib/appModel.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/appModel.test.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/apiClient.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/apiClient.test.mjs apps/desktop/src/main.mjs apps/desktop/e2e/mockApi.mjs apps/desktop/e2e/m1_happy_path.test.mjs docs/CONTEXT.md docs/WORKING.md .codex/tasks/current.json
required_evidence: Desktop route parsing and workflow stepper expose /projects/{id}/packages as the Package workflow route after a valid completed benchmark/report.
Package page uses existing createAgentPackage, listAgentPackages, getAgentPackage, and runPlayground APIs and never edits contract/verifier/playground output locally.
Browser happy path can reach Package after Benchmark, build an agent package through the mock API, run Playground, and see verifier/audit output state.
Existing backend package/playground focused tests still pass.
Docs continue to state that v0/M6 release remains NOT_GO until real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence exists.
executed_verification_commands: rg -n -- "projectPackage|listAgentPackages|createAgentPackage|runPlayground|Build package|Package built|Playground result|Agent package|Package workflow" apps/desktop/src/lib/appModel.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/appModel.test.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/apiClient.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/apiClient.test.mjs apps/desktop/src/main.mjs apps/desktop/e2e/mockApi.mjs apps/desktop/e2e/m1_happy_path.test.mjs docs/CONTEXT.md docs/WORKING.md .codex/tasks/current.json
warnings: This gate builds an agent package and playground run through existing APIs in mock/browser tests only; it does not produce export evidence or release evidence.
M6-RC and v0 release remain NOT_GO.

phase_notes.plan: Use the canonical FE v6 Package screen as the target and connect desktop Package/Playground to existing agent-package/playground APIs after completed benchmark report readiness.
phase_notes.audit: The current desktop shell keeps Package locked even though backend agent-package and playground APIs exist, so the v6 workflow cannot progress from valid benchmark report to package creation and local playground verification.
phase_notes.build: Extend desktop route parsing/workflow readiness/API client, add Package page rendering/build/playground actions, update mock API and e2e happy path.
phase_notes.check: Run desktop model/API-client tests, browser happy path, existing backend package/playground focused tests, evidence search, bootstrap m1-smoke, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this Package/Playground workflow unlock phase.

pabcd.approved_scope: Unlock the FE v6 Package/Playground workflow route in the desktop app using existing agent-package/playground APIs; update focused tests/mock/docs/PABCD only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No backend/API/schema/DB/worker/runtime changes, no release GO claim, no M6 review GO edits, no model/catalog/training/benchmark/export evidence policy changes, no downloaded weights/adapters/images/evidence bundles, no export UI implementation in this phase.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
pabcd.plan: Use the canonical FE v6 Package screen as the target and connect desktop Package/Playground to existing agent-package/playground APIs after completed benchmark report readiness.
pabcd.audit: The current desktop shell keeps Package locked even though backend agent-package and playground APIs exist, so the v6 workflow cannot progress from valid benchmark report to package creation and local playground verification.
pabcd.build: Extend desktop route parsing/workflow readiness/API client, add Package page rendering/build/playground actions, update mock API and e2e happy path.
pabcd.check: Run desktop model/API-client tests, browser happy path, existing backend package/playground focused tests, evidence search, bootstrap m1-smoke, and diff checks.
pabcd.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this Package/Playground workflow unlock phase.
